applicability_notes: Concatenates a list of N tensors along a new dimension {DIM}. Direct 1:1 mapping of torch.stack; no weights involved. All input tensors must share shape, dtype, and layout. Output rank = input rank + 1.

placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.to_device(tensor, device, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) prior to ttnn.stack

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [prefill_seq_len, embed_dim] per-user embeddings, stacked to [batch_size, prefill_seq_len, embed_dim]
placement_observations.source: call_site: input_prefill = ttnn.stack(input_prefill, dim=0) in multimodal prefill input prep (no explicit memory_config; inherits default/interleaved)
